summary: Comprehensive testing of doodle wall admin panel and help tooltip features completed successfully. All major functionality working correctly including JWT authentication, admin panel operations, and help tooltip with localStorage persistence.
passed_tests: API health check and basic connectivity
Admin login with valid credentials (admin@doodlewall.com / DoodleAdmin123!)
Admin login rejection with invalid credentials
JWT authentication with httpOnly cookies
GET /api/auth/me endpoint for authenticated users
Protected endpoint access control (401 for unauthenticated)
Admin logout functionality
Auth state invalidation after logout
Delete selected doodles endpoint (admin only)
Help button visibility in bottom left corner
Help tooltip popup display with navigation instructions
Help tooltip dismiss functionality with X button
localStorage persistence of help dismissal state
Admin button visibility in top right corner
Admin login modal display and form functionality
Error message display for invalid login attempts
Admin panel opening after successful login
Admin panel doodle grid display (19 doodles found)
Select all/deselect all button functionality
Individual doodle selection in admin panel
Delete selected button state management
Delete all button configuration
Admin panel close functionality
Auth state persistence (admin button shows authenticated state)
Basic doodle wall functionality (zoom controls, add doodle button)
Doodle count display accuracy

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All authentication and admin endpoints working correctly
success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All UI components and interactions functioning properly
